description.ko: 높은 고도의 위성 시점에서 포착된 지구 표면의 복잡하고 다양한 질감을 탐구하여 대자연의 예술적 패턴을 드러냅니다.
description.en: An exploration of the intricate and diverse textures found on the Earth's surface, captured from a high-altitude satellite perspective to reveal nature's artistic patterns.

prompt: High-resolution satellite view of diverse Earth textures, including cracked desert salt flats, lush Amazonian rainforest canopy, swirling turquoise ocean currents near coral reefs, and jagged snow-capped mountain ridges. Hyper-realistic, cinematic lighting, top-down perspective, 8k resolution.
